_meta.source: SFMTA public-records request #26-5453 (TRC7.2.22 street-cleaning citations, GPS-geocoded) joined to yhqp-riqs (segments + schedule)
_meta.method: each citation GPS-matched to nearest CNN segment (<=40m), aggregated by cnn x jsDow
_meta.note: avgMin/loMin/hiMin are local minutes-of-day; dow is JS getDay (0=Sun).
